caption: An older man with white hair and glasses, wearing a light blue patterned shirt with a green and yellow decorative element around the collar, stands behind a wooden podium giving a presentation. The setting is an indoor room with wood-paneled walls and vertical blinds in the background. On the front of the podium is a red logo with the word "TADPOLE" written in white. To the right of the frame, the white text "ORCA" is visible. Two other people, viewed from the back, sit in the foreground: one with long greyish-purple hair and another with short grey hair. As the sequence progresses, the speaker gestures with his hands while speaking, moving his right arm outwards and then bringing his hands together in front of him. A black speaker is positioned to the left of the man, and a gold-colored stanchion stands beside him.
